rationale: Keep: the cited 2003 paper is a close methodological and conceptual precursor, modeling second-by-second stopping/zapping behavior in commercials using level/velocity dynamics and hazard-style modeling, which directly overlaps with the citing paper’s moment-to-moment retention/zapping framework. The citing note explicitly says it extends prior zapping-attention research by adding emotional antecedents and joint dynamic effects, making this likely more than an incidental mention. The DOI-level matched reference further confirms a direct citation link.
